title: Chip Testing Automation One Stock Set for Years of Double-Digit Growth
text: Aehr Test Systems is positioned to benefit from multi-year secular trends in chip testing automation. The company's wafer-level burn-in solutions are becoming increasingly critical for manufacturers testing advanced semiconductors. Driven by demand from data center and AI processor customers, the company is expected to achieve double-digit revenue growth for multiple years. The analyst highlights Aehr's leading position in a niche but growing market segment, with high gross margins and improving operational efficiency. Recent analyst upgrades and significant customer wins support the investment thesis. The company's transition to AI-focused testing solutions positions it well for the next phase of semiconductor growth.
